title: Pistachio Italian Fritters
description: Crispy, cheesy fritters infused with the flavor of pistachio and Italian seasonings. Perfect as a snack or appetizer.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, mix together pistachio meal, italian breadcrumbs, parmesan cheese, and smoky mozzarella cheese.
2. In a separate bowl, beat the egg and mix with italian seasonings.
3. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
4. Heat the fry oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F.
5. Using a spoon, drop small balls of the dough into the hot oil.
6. Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
